violations.claim: VIOLATION: Parameter Object Mutation at constructor
violations.smt2:

; LINE: 14
; VIOLATION: Parameter Object Mutation at constructor
(declare-const baseUrl_before Int)
(declare-const baseUrl_after Int)
(declare-const caller_expects_mutation Int)
(assert (not (= baseUrl_after baseUrl_before)))
(assert (= caller_expects_mutation 0))
(check-sat)
